metadata.description: Official Claude Code plugins for LangGuard — AI governance, policy enforcement, and agent compliance.

plugins.name: langguard
plugins.description: Connects Claude Code to your LangGuard control plane. Provides 25 governance MCP tools, policy/compliance/audit skills, and a session-start hook that loads governance instructions tailored to your role (compliance-enforcer or operations-agent).

plugins.name: langguard-arbiter
plugins.description: In-harness agent policy enforcement. Screens, enforces, and evidences every MCP tool call at the pre-action seam (PreToolUse) against your LangGuard policies — deterministic ALLOW / DENY / ESCALATE via a session-local policy daemon, no LLM in the enforcement loop. Requires Claude Code v2.1.105+ and Node.js on PATH.
